developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! 
Super strong monsters will keep coming one after another, so do your best!

reviews.review_description: It's annoying and skewed, no realistic physics

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!
Sorry to hear the interface felt annoying. I'm continuously improving the UI and physics, so your feedback really helps.
The game may feel a bit different from traditional table tennis physics, but I’m always tweaking it to make it more enjoyable. Thanks for giving it a try!

reviews.review_description: Hi, even thogh the concept of the game is cool. the gameplay is not as much, this game, no matter how much you try the monster will make you fail. it's basically rigged aiganst the player. so unless your Truls Möregårgh, don't play this.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback!
The monster can definitely feel tough at first – the game is designed around improving rally control and consistency, so the difficulty can feel steep until you get used to the rhythm.

That said, several players have managed to defeat even the final monster with zero mistakes, so it’s absolutely possible once the timing clicks.

If you ever feel something is off or need tips, feel free to join our Discord community — I am always happy to help and hear suggestions for improving the game!

By the way, I’m the developer, and even I managed to clear up to the second-to-last boss.
If you’re curious, try searching “Easypong Clear” on YouTube.

reviews.review_description: The game is fun but is this moster even beatable like make it easyer and mabey people will rate higher

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!
I know… it’s not so “easy” after all, even though it’s called EasyPong! 😄
The key is to keep the rally going — the longer you rally, the more damage you deal to the monster. Keep at it and you’ll take them down!

By the way, I’m the developer, and even I managed to clear up to the second-to-last boss.
If you’re curious, try searching “Easypong Clear” on YouTube.

reviews.review_description: I’m left handed and there is no way to change the paddle hand

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review.
I’m sorry there was no explanation.
Left/Right selection is available. Please follow the steps below to set it up:
1. Press the A button to open the menu.
2. Go to Options → Racket.
3. Use the right arrow to open the left/right selection screen.
4. Don’t forget to press the SAVE button.
Tutorial video: search YouTube for “easypong options” (or use: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WgzmB-kzqsA).

reviews.review_description: I enjoy the game. Set up okay. Very challenging opponents. I love it. I wish i could join a room to play against other users.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! I’m really glad to hear you’re enjoying the game. Online matches are available, but since there aren’t many players yet, the lobby is often empty 😢. If you’d like, I’ve set up a Discord server for the game—please feel free to join us: https://discord.gg/kVfRmk9XfT

reviews.review_description: I get all set up but the game never starts

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your review!

When the game starts, you'll enter mirror mode, where the ball you hit comes back from the opposite side—this allows you to rally by yourself right away.

To access other modes, press the A button to open the main menu.
From there, you can start a battle against monster, play multiplayer, or change settings.

I've tested version 0.3.45 on both Quest 2 and Quest 3, and it starts up normally on my devices.

If you're still stuck after restarting or reinstalling the game,  feel free to join the Discord server for support:
https://discord.gg/kVfRmk9XfT

I'll do my best to help figure it out.

reviews.review_description: I’m hoping this isn’t a finished game,  i think when  i downloaded it said early access, so I’m hoping they’re still working on it, if so it should end up being decent.  I will say  i don’t suck this bad at 11table tennis, but I’m honestly thinking about getting a refund on that and just keeping easy pong.  The bugs need to be worked out, and tracking and the paddle need to be tweaked a little bit.  I have to move the table every time  i start the game, when  i start its always floating in the air above my head, once it was even behind me and centering didn’t bring it in front it kept it behind me. And  i can’t quite figure out what’s wrong with the paddle, something just feels a little off, maybe a little unresponsive or “late” to what  i did, idk what it is exactly but it’s just not quite ‘there’ yet. But it’s very close. Also, think about adding some of the arcade style games the Wii ping pong games used to have, like a record return count or a target game like hitting the solo cups off the , would help with getting better at the game but also might help you guys get more tracking info and improve the game even more.

developer_response.body:
レビューありがとう。期待してくれているみたいでうれしいです。まだまだ開発中ですよ。
テーブルの位置は、左右の親指のスティックで移動できるので、試してみてください。説明が全くなくてすみません！
プログラム内で前回のテーブル位置を覚えるようにしているので、毎回の調整は必要ないはずです（たぶん）。ラケットのトラッキングは私も色々ためしたんだけど、確かにまだ改善できる余地はありそう。でも、難しい箇所で、これ以上よくなるかな～笑。がんばります。

ミニゲームは今後増やしたいですね。アイデアありがとう！

reviews.review_title: Might be the best free table tennis game
reviews.review_description: Good physics not many bugs/glitches, from the few table tennis games I’ve played this one is very good especially for being free and in early access. Only thing it is missing is a way to play with friends/online

developer_response.body:
レビューありがとうございます。評価してもらって、とてもうれしいです。モンスターをたくさん用意しているので、対戦を楽しんでください！
すみません。オンライン対戦は、私の技術ではむずかしいですね。今のところルームを作って２人でプレイすることしかできませんが、チャンスがあれば遠隔地の友人や家族と試してみてください。
>>>>>>
現在のバージョンはVer0.3.45ですが、２人でのオンライン対戦機能と、４人が同じ部屋でプレイするマルチプレイ機能を追加しています。よかったら試してください。

reviews.review_description: It was interesting seeing what it’s like to play against myself. lol. I found myself playing this for quite some time. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: ありがとう！モンスターとの対戦モードもありますが、もうやりましたか？めっちゃ難しいのですが笑。楽しんでくださいね！

reviews.review_description: This is an awesome game you should try. It’s surprisingly addictive. Multiplayer is coming soon!

developer_response.body:
対戦モード楽しんでくれているようでうれしいです。
「マルチプレイモードも期待してください！」と言いたいところですが、ネットワークプログラムはとても難しい。。あまり期待しないで笑。でも、がんばります！2回もレビューしてくれて、ありがとうございます。
>>>>>>
現在のバージョンはVer0.3.45ですが、２人でのオンライン対戦機能と、４人が同じ部屋でプレイするマルチプレイ機能を追加しています。よかったら試してください。
